overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded warrior exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks through columned courtyards, narrow hieroglyphic corridors, and emerges onto a grand terrace with massive sphinx statues overlooking water and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: columned temple courtyard with decorative planters

events.description: character ascends wide stone staircase with red patterned carpet
passing rectangular lily pond with water plants and stone benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard, ascending stairs and navigating between massive decorated columns

notable_agents.action: temple worker in blue robes walking along the courtyard wall

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns with colorful painted patterns and hieroglyphs
wide ceremonial stairs with red patterned carpet runner
oriental rugs laid across the stone tile floor
rectangular water basin with lily pads and reeds
simple stone seating along the pond edge

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sunlit temple courtyard surrounded by massive painted columns. After ascending a carpeted staircase, they walk past a serene lily pond with stone benches while a temple worker walks in the distance.

events.description: entering narrow corridor between high walls covered in carvings
emerging from shadowed corridor into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow passage flanked by carved stone walls toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near the exit doorway

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in detailed Egyptian hieroglyphic carvings and reliefs
large rectangular stone opening leading to bright exterior terrace

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor between towering walls covered in hieroglyphic carvings. Walking toward the bright light at the end, they pass a temple guard standing near the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple terrace with monumental sphinx statues

events.description: exiting corridor onto open terrace with panoramic mountain and water views
character slows and turns to survey the massive sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the red carpet on the terrace, observing the massive stone sphinx statues and panoramic vista

notable_agents.action: civilian walking along the terrace edge near the waterfront view

entered.detail: massive stone sphinx sculptures with detailed faces and headdresses
distant mountain range visible beyond the temple complex
body of water visible between terrace columns and balustrades
tall palm trees in large decorative planters
metal fire bowls with flames on stone pedestals
large seated statues of pharaohs with golden crowns

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a grand open terrace, the character walks past massive sphinx statues while taking in the panoramic view of mountains and water. The terrace is lined with palm trees and burning ceremonial braziers as other civilians walk about.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with pharaoh statues and ceremonial stairs

events.description: character stops and looks up at the towering temple facade
descending the wide ceremonial staircase with red carpet

agents.ego_description: examining the temple entrance with seated pharaoh statues, then descending the red-carpeted stairs while looking around

notable_agents.action: child running across the terrace near the stairs

entered.detail: tall stone temple facade with flags and banners above the doorway
wide grand staircase with red carpet leading down from the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the temple entrance, looking up at the massive seated pharaoh statues flanking the doorway. After pausing to observe the architecture, they descend the grand ceremonial staircase as a child runs nearby and birds fly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the intimate, sunlit courtyards of a temple into a vast, open-air ceremonial complex. It begins amidst massive painted columns and a serene lily pond, moving upward via a carpeted staircase before transitioning into a narrow corridor defined by towering walls of hieroglyphic carvings. As the camera follows the character toward a bright exit, the scene opens abruptly onto a grand terrace where massive sphinx statues and burning braziers frame a panoramic view of distant mountains and water. The movement then shifts toward the temple entrance, looking up at colossal seated pharaoh statues before finally descending a grand ceremonial staircase as birds fly overhead and civilians move through the plaza.
